title: AIRWICK 25 ml Reed Diffuser Pure Spring Delight
description: Product Description Airwick 25 ml reed Diffuser pure spring Delight. This pack contains 1 x Airwick reed Diffuser pure spring Delight scented. Directions 1. Remove the cap from the bottle. 2. Insert the rattan reeds into the bottle. 3. Place the bottle in a safe location where it won't be knocked over. 4. For a stronger scent, flip the reeds occasionally. 5. Keep out of reach of children and pets. 6. If medical advice is needed, have the product container or label at hand. 7. Do not ingest the product. 8. If the product comes into contact with skin or eyes, rinse immediately with water. 9. Air fresheners do not replace good hygiene practices. Safety Warning PLEASE READ CAREFULLY THE SAFETY AND PRECAUTIONARY TEXT BEFORE USE. KEEP FOR FUTURE REFERENCE. Use only as directed. Causes skin irritation. Causes serious eye irritation. Harmful to aquatic life with long lasting effects. Keep out of reach of children and pets. If medical advice is needed, have product container or label at hand. IF SWALLOWED: Immediately call a doctor. Wear protective gloves and eye/face protection: IF ON SKIN: Wash with soap and water. If skin irritation or a rash occurs: Get medical advice/attention. IF IN EYES: Rinse cautiously with water for several minutes. Remove contact lenses if present and easy to do - continue rinsing. If eye irritation persists get medical advice/attention. People suffering from perfume sensitivity should be cautious when using this product. Air Fresheners do not replace good hygiene practices. See more
